game_name: Spider-Man: Return of the Sinister Six

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for NES version

special_mechanics.name: wall_climb
special_mechanics.description: Spider-Man can climb certain walls and trees

physics_values.notes: ceiling climbing was planned but removed before release (found in unused graphics)

special_mechanics.name: web_swing
special_mechanics.description: Spider-Man can shoot webs to swing on

special_mechanics.name: web_projectile
special_mechanics.description: Can shoot square web projectiles after collecting web fluid

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. No exact physics parameters documented in available sources. Movement characteristics known only from gameplay descriptions and critical reception (Nintendo Power noted weak play control and collision issues). Specific gravity, acceleration, and jump mechanics not quantified in any documentation.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Spider-Man: Return of the Sinister Six
